lastName - Variable in class model.Person
Person's last name (non-empty string)
lastName - Variable in class model.User
User's last name (non-empty string)

Latitude of eventâ€™s location
load(String) - Method in class service.LoadService
Calls the clear service and then loads the data
LoadRequest - Class in request
Clears all data from the database (just like clear) and loads the posted user, person, and event data into the database
LoadRequest() - Constructor for class request.LoadRequest
 
LoadResult - Class in result
Reports success or failure
LoadResult() - Constructor for class result.LoadResult
 
LoadService - Class in service
Handles the load functionality
LoadService() - Constructor for class service.LoadService
 
login() - Method in class service.RegisterService
Logs-in in user
LoginRequest - Class in request
Logs in the user
LoginRequest() - Constructor for class request.LoginRequest
 
LoginResult - Class in result
Reports success or failure
LoginResult() - Constructor for class result.LoginResult
 
LoginService - Class in service
Handles the login functionality
LoginService() - Constructor for class service.LoginService
 
loginUser(String, String) - Method in class service.LoginService
Logs-in a user
longitude - Variable in class model.Event
Longitude of eventâ€™s location
